note_to_candidate: These 15 questions exercise the same failure modes the reviewer's held-out set will test, but the reviewer uses a similar but different set when grading. Building to pass only these specific questions will hurt your score. Use these to validate your system end-to-end.

questions.question: What is the standard notice period at Meridian?
What is the hotel cap per night for business travel to Europe?
What is the procurement approval threshold for purchases above AED 50,000?
How long are employee records retained after termination?
ما هي إجازة الحداد المخصصة للموظفين في حالة وفاة أحد أفراد الأسرة المباشرة؟
If I travel from Dubai to Abu Dhabi for a meeting with a UAE government client, what approvals and expense rules apply?
I want to expense a client dinner of AED 1,800 using my corporate card. What do I need to do?
What's the total leave I can take in my first year for the birth of a child, combining paternity and annual leave?
A new vendor needs to be onboarded urgently for a project requiring a contract of AED 200,000. What are the steps and approvals?
How many days of paternity leave am I entitled to?
questions.hint_for_candidate: This is a trick question — two documents disagree. Your agent must surface the conflict.

questions.question: Can I carry forward unused sick days to next year?
How many days per week can I work remotely?
How far in advance do I need to submit a travel request?
What is Meridian's stock ticker symbol?
